name: Maritime Shipboard Follow Configuration
description: You are a Maritime Search and Rescue operator. Your drone will launch from a moving Coast Guard cutter. Configure the drone to follow the ship's MAVLink beacon and establish a coastal Rally Point for emergency diversion. Using the deployment brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/maritime_brief.txt, configure the 7 ArduPilot parameters required for Follow Mode, including the spatial offsets based on the ship's dimensions (use exactly half the ship's length for the backward offset). Create a Rally Point at the coastal coordinates specified in the brief and save the plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/coastal_divert.plan. Do not launch the vehicle.
